## Security / Privacy Review

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, raw audio, or private transcripts are exposed.
- [ ] Logs and evidence avoid sensitive data.
- [ ] Paid cloud resources are not enabled without approval.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope matches the linked issue.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are satisfied or explicitly deferred.
- [ ] Evidence is linked.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] Manual follow-up steps are listed.
